QuerySlots.Name: Sample Query 3
QuerySlots.Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM orders

QuerySlots.Name: Sample Query 4
QuerySlots.Sql: SELECT * FROM categories ORDER BY name

QuerySlots.Name: Sample Query 5
QuerySlots.Sql: SELECT id, title FROM posts WHERE published = 1 LIMIT 5

QuerySlots.Name: Sample Query 7
QuerySlots.Sql: SELECT product_name, price FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN @minPrice AND @maxPrice

QuerySlots.Name: Sample Query 9
QuerySlots.Sql: SELECT order_id, order_date, total FROM orders WHERE order_date >= @startDate
